input_text: Anna handed a key to Mark. Mike and Mickey are not female. The letter was written in June. Winona is a cat. Emajogi's length is 80 kilometers. Muggles cannot disappear. A chocolate cake fell. A village road was narrow. Frogs are small. The book was read by Sara. The street is in Tallinn. John is defeated. Tom failed to catch the bus. A blue square is cool. Elephants have a trunk with a probability 10 percent. Riga is not in Estonia. Mary, a pilot, smiled. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Unexpectedly, the door opened. The woman holding a heavy lamp sang. A very big mouse is nice. A surgeon, Dr. Smith, entered the room. Sandra travelled to the office. Mr Dursley is a catholic. The dog chased by the boy escaped. The window was broken. The teacher showed the map to the students. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The tree was cut by the farmer. Emily is a wolf. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. John is not defeated?
